title: 2 PCS Bottle Bag Wine Bottle Holder Bag for 6/4 Bottles Bottle Carrier Bag with Carry Handle for Fishing Camping Travel Shopping Storage
features: Package:You will receive 2 different sizes of wine bottle bags, one with six compartments and one with four compartments, you can choose the appropriate bag according to your needs.

Durable and lightweight construction: Crafted from high-quality materials, our bottle bag is built to last and easy to carry. It ensures that your wine bottles remain protected throughout your journey. Additionally, the black bottle bag can accommodate ice packs or wet towels to keep your wine cool during transport.

Multiple compartments for maximum bottle capacity: Each compartment of our wine bottle bag can hold up to 750ml bottles, allowing you to safely transport multiple bottles at once. The soft padded dividers inside the bag ensure that your bottles won't collide with each other, providing excellent protection against potential damage.

Ideal for picnics, parties, and travel: Designed with a convenient handle, our bottle bag is perfect for outdoor picnics, parties, or any travel adventure. It is a practical choice for wine enthusiasts who want to enjoy their favorite wines wherever they go.

Versatile and stylish design: Our black wine bottle carrier bag not only offers functionality but also boasts a fashionable design. It makes an ideal gift for any wine lover in your life. Moreover, besides wine bottles, this bag can also be used to carry other beverages, such as champagne, spirits, or even non-alcoholic drinks.
description: Specification Product Name:bottle carrier bag,wine & bottle bags, Wine Bottle Bag Product Include：2×Wine Bottle Bags Individual Product Size Six compartments:31*25*18cm/12.2*9.8*7in Four compartments:31*18*18cm/12.2*7*7in Package Wight:122g/0.26lb Color:Black Features 1.The wine bottle holder bag is made of high-quality and sturdy material, ensuring that it can safely carry and protect your wine bottles. 2.The bag includes divider, allowing you to securely fit different sized wine bottles and prevent them from clinking together. 3.Besides carrying wine bottles, this bag can also be used to transport other beverages, such as champagne, spirits, or even non-alcoholic drinks. If you have any questions or dissatisfaction after receiving the goods, you can contact us to solve the problem.
